name: Lady Webster's Gingerbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all dry ingredients together.
2. Melt the margarine and treacle in the milk until fully dissolved.
3. Pour the melted mixture into the beaten egg.
4. Gradually mix in the dry ingredients, adding 2 or 3 ounces of peel if desired.
5. Pour the batter into a well-greased tin, weighing 2 pounds.
6. Bake in a moderate oven for 1 to 1 1/2 hours until the mixture is slack like a thick brown sauce.
Note: The original recipe was attributed to Lady Riddell Webster at W.R.I. show and Mrs. B. Park from Bridgefoot, Dundee. These attributions have been removed as per the instructions.
